title: UAE revokes Ajman's Horizon University licence over 'severe and repeated' violations; students to be transferred
summary_full: The UAE Ministry of Higher Education revoked Horizon University College's license due to severe and repeated violations. This action immediately halts all academic activities and student admissions at the institution. The ministry is coordinating with other universities to ensure students can continue their education. Affected learners will receive support during this transition process. This move reinforces the UAE's commitment to maintaining high academic standards.
